Assignments.Title: Case Study Analysis: Data Analytics in Real Business Practice
Assignments.ExtraInstructions: The students should research a specific scenario with a real business where data analytics were used to meet an objective. They must state what the business objective, the type of analysis, the source of data, and the results of the use of analytics. Reference (web or other must be given). The paper must be concise stating; (1) Business, (2) Objective, (3) Analysis Design, (4) Source of Data, (5) Results of Analysis, (6) Effect on Business Practice, (7) References.
